origin_fips_state: 1Estimate is movers within the United States for counties or county equivalents in the United States or movers within Puerto Rico for municipios.

Blank cells represent estimates that are not available.
MOE - Margin of error based on 90% confidence interval.
Source: U.S. Census Bureau, 2013-2017 American Community Survey. For more information, see https://census.gov/acs.
